name: Bishkek (Kyrgyzstan)

colors.symbolism: the sky and the rivers of the Chuy Valley

description: A blue field charged centrally with the coat of arms of Bishkek.
history: Bishkek is the capital of Kyrgyzstan and one of two cities of republican significance (alongside Osh), administered separately from the surrounding Chuy Region. The flag and coat of arms were adopted after independence in 1991.
